Tool Result #144 shell_command call_yU3ZR6deV76Pm1k03AmDoZzA exit 0 00:46:34
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 1.2 seconds Output: import process from "node:process"; import express from "express"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; import { TASK_STATUS } f...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 1.2 seconds
Output:
import process from "node:process";
import express from "express";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STATUS } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  collectRunSourceIds,
  createId,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  enqueueDiscoveryBatch,
  enqueueSeedBatch,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  loadSeedPlan,
  log,
  preparePipelineRun,
  resetPipelineSources,
} from "@papaweb/shared";
import {
  TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  buildCsvFilename,
  buildTasksExportQuery,
  buildToolsExportQuery,
  sendCsv,
} from "./csv-export.mjs";
import { loadPipelineMetrics } from "./metrics.mjs";

const serviceName = "query-api";
const defaultConfig = getPlatformConfig();
const VALID_TASK_STATUSES = new Set(Object.values(TASK_STATUS));

export function createApp(options = {}) {
  const config = options.config ?? defaultConfig;
  const pg = options.pg ?? createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = options.redis ?? createRedisClient(config.redis);
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const loadSeedPlanImpl = options.loadSeedPlanImpl ?? loadSeedPlan;
  const collectRunSourceIdsImpl = options.collectRunSourceIdsImpl ?? collectRunSourceIds;
  const preparePipelineRunImpl = options.preparePipelineRunImpl ?? preparePipelineRun;
  const resetPipelineSourcesImpl = options.resetPipelineSourcesImpl ?? resetPipelineSources;
  const enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl = options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl ?? enqueueDiscoveryBatch;
  const enqueueSeedBatchImpl = options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl ?? enqueueSeedBatch;
  const loadPipelineMetricsImpl = options.loadPipelineMetricsImpl ?? loadPipelineMetrics;

  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json({ limit: "256kb" }));

  app.get(
    "/healthz",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      await pg.query("SELECT 1");
      res.status(200).json({ status: "ok", service: serviceName });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tools",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tasks",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/metrics",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const metrics = await loadPipelineMetricsImpl(pg, redis, config);
      res.json(metrics);
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/source-sites",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const rows = await pg.query(
        `SELECT id, name, base_url, enabled, meta, updated_at
         FROM source_sites
         ORDER BY id ASC`
      );
      res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tools.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tools", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
        }),
        TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tasks", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
          status: filters.status,
        }),
        TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.post(
    "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const body = parseSeedRunRequest(req.body, config);
      const seedPlan = await loadSeedPlanImpl({
        seedUrls: body.seedUrls.length > 0 ? body.seedUrls : config.seedUrls,
        sourceId: body.sourceId,
        sourceIds: body.sourceIds.length > 0 ? body.sourceIds : config.sourceIds,
        sourceSitesConfigPath: config.sourceSitesConfigPath,
      });

      const runSourceIds = collectRunSourceIdsImpl(seedPlan, [body.sourceId]);
      await preparePipelineRunImpl(pg, {
        sourceIds: runSourceIds,
        runId: body.runId,
        requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
        reason: body.reason,
        meta: {
          ...(body.coldStart ? { coldStart: true } : {}),
          ...(body.runLabel ? { runLabel: body.runLabel } : {}),
        },
      });

      let reset = null;
      if (body.coldStart) {
        reset = await resetPipelineSourcesImpl(pg, redis, {
          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
          queues: config.queues,
        });
      }

      const result =
        seedPlan.sourceSites && seedPlan.sourceSites.length > 0
          ? await enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
              candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource ?? 0,
              discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit ?? 0,
            })
          : await enqueueSeedBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
            });

      res.status(202).json({
        accepted: true,
        ...result,
        runId: body.runId,
        runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
        coldStart: body.coldStart,
        reset,
        requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
        reason: body.reason,
        candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource,
        discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit,
      });
    })
  );

  app.use((error, _req, _res, next) => {
    if (error instanceof SyntaxError && "body" in error) {
      next(new ApiError(400, "invalid_json_body", "Request body must be valid JSON"));
      return;
    }
    next(error);
  });

  app.use((error, req, res, _next) => {
    const normalized = normalizeApiError(error);
    if (normalized.statusCode >= 500) {
      logImpl(serviceName, "error", "query-api request failed", {
        path: req.path,
        method: req.method,
        error: normalized.message,
      });
    }

    const payload = {
      error: {
        code: normalized.code,
        message: normalized.message,
      },
    };
    if (normalized.details) {
      payload.error.details = normalized.details;
    }
    if (req.path === "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run") {
      payload.accepted = false;
    }

    res.status(normalized.statusCode).json(payload);
  });

  return { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl };
}

export async function main(options = {}) {
  const runtime = createApp(options);
  const { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl } = runtime;
  await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);

  const server = app.listen(config.queryApiPort, () => {
    logImpl(serviceName, "info", "query-api started", { port: config.queryApiPort });
  });

  const shutdown = async () => {
    server.close(async () => {
      await redis.quit();
      await pg.end();
      process.exit(0);
    });
  };

  process.on("SIGINT", shutdown);
  process.on("SIGTERM", shutdown);
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "query-api crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

export function buildToolsListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`g.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`g.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(
      `EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM crawl_tasks t
         WHERE t.trace_id = g.trace_id
           AND t.job_id = $${values.length}
       )`
    );
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         g.id,
         g.run_id,
         g.canonical_url,
         g.title,
         g.summary,
         g.source_id,
         g.quality_score,
         g.trace_id,
         g.published_at,
         g.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM gold_tool_entities g
       ${where}
       ORDER BY g.published_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

export function buildTasksListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`t.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(`t.job_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`t.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.status) {
    values.push(filters.status);
    conditions.push(`t.status = $${values.length}`);
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         t.run_id,
         t.id,
         t.job_id,
         t.trace_id,
         t.source_id,
         t.url,
         t.final_url,
         t.fetch_channel,
         t.decoded_charset,
         t.stage,
         t.status,
         t.http_status,
         t.error,
         t.published,
         t.created_at,
         t.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM crawl_tasks t
       ${where}
       ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

function asyncHandler(fn) {
  return (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
}

function parseToolsListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseToolsExportRequest(query) {
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksExportRequest(query) {
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseSeedRunRequest(body, config) {
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", "Request body must be a JSON object");
  }

  const seedUrls = readOptionalStringList(body.seedUrls, "seedUrls");
  const sourceIds = readOptionalStringList(body.sourceIds, "sourceIds");
  const requestedBy = readOptionalBodyString(body.requestedBy, "requestedBy") || "query-api";
  const reason = readOptionalBodyString(body.reason, "reason") || "manual_trigger";
  const sourceId = readOptionalBodyString(body.sourceId, "sourceId") || config.sourceId;
  const runId = readOptionalBodyString(body.runId, "runId") || createId("run");
  const runLabel = readOptionalBodyString(body.runLabel, "runLabel");
  const coldStart = parseStrictBoolean(body.coldStart, "coldStart", false);
  const candidateLimitPerSource = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.candidateLimitPerSource, "candidateLimitPerSource", {
    min: 1,
    max: 10000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });
  const discoveryPageLimit = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.discoveryPageLimit, "discoveryPageLimit", {
    min: 1,
    max: 1000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });

  return {
    seedUrls,
    sourceIds,
    requestedBy,
    reason,
    sourceId,
    runId,
    runLabel,
    coldStart,
    candidateLimitPerSource,
    discoveryPageLimit,
  };
}

function parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit, maxLimit }) {
  const limit = parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", {
    defaultValue: defaultLimit,
    min: 1,
    max: maxLimit,
  });
  const hasOffset = query.offset !== undefined;
  const hasPage = query.page !== undefined;
  if (hasOffset && hasPage) {
    throw new ApiError(
      400,
      "invalid_query_parameter",
      "Query parameters offset and page cannot be used together",
      { fields: ["offset", "page"] }
    );
  }

  if (hasOffset) {
    const offset = parseBoundedInteger(query.offset, "offset", {
      defaultValue: 0,
      min: 0,
      max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
    });
    return {
      limit,
      offset,
      page: Math.floor(offset / Math.max(limit, 1)) + 1,
    };
  }

  const page = parseBoundedInteger(query.page, "page", {
    defaultValue: 1,
    min: 1,
    max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
  });
  return {
    limit,
    offset: (page - 1) * limit,
    page,
  };
}

function buildListResponse(rows, filters) {
  const total = rows.length > 0 ? toNumber(rows[0].total_count) : 0;
  const items = rows.map((row) => {
    const next = { ...row };
    delete next.total_count;
    return next;
  });
  return {
    items,
    count: items.length,
    total,
    limit: filters.limit,
    offset: filters.offset,
    page: filters.page,
  };
}

function readOptionalQueryString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "query");
}

function readOptionalBodyString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "body");
}

function readOptionalString(value, fieldName, location) {
  const errorCode = location === "body" ? "invalid_request_body" : "invalid_query_parameter";
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must be a string`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const text = String(value).trim();
  if (!text) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must not be empty`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return text;
}

function readOptionalStringList(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return [];

  let items = [];
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    items = value.map((item) => {
      if (typeof item !== "string") {
        throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must contain only strings`, {
          field: fieldName,
        });
      }
      return item.trim();
    });
  } else if (typeof value === "string") {
    items = value.split(",").map((item) => item.trim());
  } else {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a string or string array`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }

  const normalized = items.filter(Boolean);
  if (normalized.length === 0) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must include at least one value`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return normalized;
}

function parseStrictBoolean(value, fieldName, defaultValue) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (typeof value === "boolean") {
    return value;
  }

  const normalized = String(value).trim().toLowerCase();
  if (["1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(normalized)) return true;
  if (["0", "false", "no", "n", "off"].includes(normalized)) return false;
  throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a boolean`, {
    field: fieldName,
  });
}

function parseOptionalBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return null;
  }
  return parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode });
}

function parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { defaultValue = null, min, max, errorCode = "invalid_query_parameter" }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    if (defaultValue === null) {
      throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} is required`, {
        field: fieldName,
      });
    }
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const numeric = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isInteger(numeric)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  if (numeric < min || numeric > max) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be between ${min} and ${max}`, {
      field: fieldName,
      min,
      max,
    });
  }
  return numeric;
}

function normalizeApiError(error) {
  if (error instanceof ApiError) {
    return error;
  }
  return new ApiError(500, "internal_error", error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
}

function toNumber(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
}

function capitalize(value) {
  const text = String(value || "");
  return text.length > 0 ? `${text[0].toUpperCase()}${text.slice(1)}` : text;
}

class ApiError extends Error {
  constructor(statusCode, code, message, details = null) {
    super(message);
    this.statusCode = statusCode;
    this.code = code;
    this.details = details;
  }
}
Tool Result #145 shell_command call_O4FB4pTC2wU9HKQqKDCbLBVy exit 0 00:46:34
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 1 seconds Output: export async function loadPipelineMetrics(pg, redis, config) { const [taskAgg, jobAgg, discoveryDepth, fetchDepth, normalizeDepth, qual...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 1 seconds
Output:
export async function loadPipelineMetrics(pg, redis, config) {
  const [taskAgg, jobAgg, discoveryDepth, fetchDepth, normalizeDepth, qualityDepth, publishDepth] =
    await Promise.all([
      pg.query(
        `SELECT
           COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'published') AS published_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'quality_rejected') AS quality_rejected_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fetch_failed') AS fetch_failed_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_fetch') AS queued_fetch_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_normalize') AS queued_normalize_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_quality') AS queued_quality_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_publish') AS queued_publish_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fetching') AS fetching_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (
             WHERE status = 'fetching'
               AND COALESCE(
                 fetch_lease_expires_at,
                 updated_at + ($1::bigint * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')
               ) < NOW()
           ) AS stale_fetching_tasks,
           COALESCE(
             EXTRACT(
               EPOCH FROM (
                 NOW() - MIN(
                   CASE
                     WHEN status = 'queued_fetch' THEN COALESCE(last_fetch_enqueue_at, created_at)
                     ELSE NULL
                   END
                 )
               )
             ),
             0
           )::bigint AS oldest_queued_fetch_age_seconds
         FROM crawl_tasks`,
        [config.fetchStaleAfterMs]
      ),
      pg.query(
        `SELECT
           COUNT(*) AS total_jobs,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'discovering') AS discovering_jobs,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued') AS queued_jobs,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') AS completed_jobs
         FROM crawl_jobs`
      ),
      redis.llen(config.queues.discovery),
      redis.llen(config.queues.fetch),
      redis.llen(config.queues.normalize),
      redis.llen(config.queues.quality),
      redis.llen(config.queues.publish),
    ]);

  return formatPipelineMetrics({
    taskAgg: taskAgg.rows[0] ?? {},
    jobAgg: jobAgg.rows[0] ?? {},
    queueDepths: {
      discovery: discoveryDepth,
      fetch: fetchDepth,
      normalize: normalizeDepth,
      quality: qualityDepth,
      publish: publishDepth,
    },
  });
}

export function formatPipelineMetrics({ taskAgg = {}, jobAgg = {}, queueDepths = {} }) {
  const published = toNumber(taskAgg.published_tasks);
  const rejected = toNumber(taskAgg.quality_rejected_tasks);
  const attempts = published + rejected;
  const publishPassRate = attempts > 0 ? Number((published / attempts).toFixed(4)) : 0;
  const queuedFetchTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_fetch_tasks);
  const queuedNormalizeTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_normalize_tasks);
  const queuedQualityTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_quality_tasks);
  const queuedPublishTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_publish_tasks);
  const fetchingTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.fetching_tasks);
  const normalizedQueueDepths = {
    discovery: toNumber(queueDepths.discovery),
    fetch: toNumber(queueDepths.fetch),
    normalize: toNumber(queueDepths.normalize),
    quality: toNumber(queueDepths.quality),
    publish: toNumber(queueDepths.publish),
  };

  return {
    totalTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.total_tasks),
    publishedTasks: published,
    qualityRejectedTasks: rejected,
    fetchFailedTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.fetch_failed_tasks),
    queuedFetchTasks,
    queuedNormalizeTasks,
    queuedQualityTasks,
    queuedPublishTasks,
    fetchingTasks,
    activeTaskBacklog: queuedFetchTasks + queuedNormalizeTasks + queuedQualityTasks + queuedPublishTasks + fetchingTasks,
    staleFetchingTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.stale_fetching_tasks),
    oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds: toNumber(taskAgg.oldest_queued_fetch_age_seconds),
    publishPassRate,
    totalJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.total_jobs),
    discoveringJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.discovering_jobs),
    queuedJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.queued_jobs),
    completedJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.completed_jobs),
    queueDepths: {
      ...normalizedQueueDepths,
      total:
        normalizedQueueDepths.discovery +
        normalizedQueueDepths.fetch +
        normalizedQueueDepths.normalize +
        normalizedQueueDepths.quality +
        normalizedQueueDepths.publish,
    },
  };
}

function toNumber(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
}

Exit code: 0

Output:
export async function ensurePlatformSchema(pg) {
  const lockKey = 20260313;
  const baseSql = `
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crawl_jobs (
      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      status TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crawl_tasks (
      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      job_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES crawl_jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
      trace_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      url TEXT NOT NULL,
      stage TEXT NOT NULL,
      status TEXT NOT NULL,
      error TEXT,
      http_status INT,
      raw_html TEXT,
      normalized JSONB,
      quality JSONB,
      published BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
      fetch_attempt_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      fetch_enqueue_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      last_fetch_enqueue_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      fetch_claimed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      fetch_lease_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      fetch_worker TEXT,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS url_state (
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      url TEXT NOT NULL,
      status TEXT NOT NULL,
      last_http_status INT,
      last_error TEXT,
      title TEXT,
      summary TEXT,
      last_fetched_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url)
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS seed_state (
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      seed_url TEXT NOT NULL,
      last_enqueued_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      enqueued_count BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url)
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS source_sites (
      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      name TEXT NOT NULL,
      base_url TEXT NOT NULL,
      enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
      meta JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS policy_versions (
      id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      version TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      config JSONB NOT NULL,
      active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quality_scores (
      task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES crawl_tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
      score NUMERIC(6,4) NOT NULL,
      threshold NUMERIC(6,4) NOT NULL,
      pass BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
      reasons JSONB NOT NULL,
      policy_version TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gold_tool_entities (
      id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      canonical_url TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      title TEXT NOT NULL,
      summary TEXT,
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      quality_score NUMERIC(6,4) NOT NULL,
      trace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      published_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pipeline_events (
      id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      run_id TEXT,
      trace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      job_id TEXT,
      task_id TEXT,
      worker TEXT NOT NULL,
      event TEXT NOT NULL,
      payload JSONB,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS source_run_state (
      source_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      active_run_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      requested_by TEXT,
      reason TEXT,
      meta JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
      activated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );
  `;
  const indexSql = `
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_status ON crawl_tasks(status);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_stage ON crawl_tasks(stage);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_created_at ON crawl_tasks(created_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_fetch_lease ON crawl_tasks(status, fetch_lease_expires_at);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_last_fetch_enqueue ON crawl_tasks(status, last_fetch_enqueue_at);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_run_id ON crawl_tasks(run_id, created_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_jobs_run_id ON crawl_jobs(run_id, created_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gold_tool_entities_published_at ON gold_tool_entities(published_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gold_tool_entities_run_id ON gold_tool_entities(run_id, published_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pipeline_events_run_id ON pipeline_events(run_id, created_at DESC);
  `;
  await pg.query("SELECT pg_advisory_lock($1)", [lockKey]);
  try {
    await pg.query(baseSql);
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE crawl_jobs
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requested_by TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reason TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meta JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE crawl_tasks
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_url TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_channel TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS decoded_charset TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discovery_source_url TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_attempt_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_enqueue_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_fetch_enqueue_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_claimed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_lease_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_worker TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE gold_tool_entities
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE pipeline_events
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE url_state
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_id TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `UPDATE url_state
       SET source_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(source_id, ''), 'legacy')
       WHERE source_id IS NULL
          OR source_id = ''`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE url_state
       ALTER COLUMN source_id SET NOT NULL`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `DO $$
       BEGIN
         IF EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'url_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'url_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) <> 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE url_state DROP CONSTRAINT url_state_pkey;
         END IF;
         IF NOT EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'url_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'url_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) = 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE url_state ADD PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url);
         END IF;

         IF EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'seed_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'seed_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) <> 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE seed_state DROP CONSTRAINT seed_state_pkey;
         END IF;
         IF NOT EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'seed_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'seed_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) = 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE seed_state ADD PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url);
         END IF;
       END $$`
    );
    await pg.query(indexSql);
  } finally {
    await pg.query("SELECT pg_advisory_unlock($1)", [lockKey]);
  }
}

Tool Result #167 shell_command call_ot0KreDy5twrtBTqj7JdEGVv exit 0 00:48:27
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: import { spawn } from "node:child_process"; import path from "node:path"; import process from "node:process"; import { fileURLToPath ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
import path from "node:path";
import process from "node:process";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const REPO_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, "..");
const SCRIPT_ROOT = path.join(REPO_ROOT, "infra", "docker");

const COMMANDS = new Set(["start", "health", "smoke", "test", "e2e"]);

function parseArgs(argv) {
  const args = {
    command: "health",
    build: false,
    withGrafana: false,
    timeoutSec: 300,
    minPublished: 1,
  };

  if (argv.length > 0 && COMMANDS.has(argv[0])) {
    args.command = argv[0];
    argv = argv.slice(1);
  }

  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i += 1) {
    const token = argv[i];
    const next = argv[i + 1];

    if (token === "--build") {
      args.build = true;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--with-grafana") {
      args.withGrafana = true;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--timeout-sec" && next) {
      args.timeoutSec = Number(next);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--min-published" && next) {
      args.minPublished = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
  }

  if (!Number.isInteger(args.timeoutSec) || args.timeoutSec <= 0) {
    args.timeoutSec = 300;
  }
  if (!Number.isInteger(args.minPublished) || args.minPublished <= 0) {
    args.minPublished = 1;
  }

  return args;
}

function getShellCommand() {
  return process.platform === "win32" ? "powershell" : "pwsh";
}

function quotePowerShell(text) {
  return `'${String(text).replaceAll("'", "''")}'`;
}

function toPowerShellBool(value) {
  return value ? "$true" : "$false";
}

function runPowerShell(command) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const child = spawn(
      getShellCommand(),
      ["-NoLogo", "-NoProfile", "-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass", "-Command", command],
      {
        cwd: REPO_ROOT,
        stdio: "inherit",
      }
    );

    child.on("error", reject);
    child.on("exit", (code) => {
      if (code === 0) {
        resolve();
        return;
      }
      reject(new Error(`PowerShell command failed with exit code ${code ?? -1}`));
    });
  });
}

async function runStart(args) {
  const scriptPath = path.join(SCRIPT_ROOT, "start.ps1");
  const buildFlag = args.build ? " -Build" : "";
  const command = `& ${quotePowerShell(scriptPath)} -Stage D -WithGrafana ${toPowerShellBool(args.withGrafana)}${buildFlag}`;
  await runPowerShell(command);
}

async function runHealth(args) {
  const scriptPath = path.join(SCRIPT_ROOT, "healthcheck.ps1");
  const command = `& ${quotePowerShell(scriptPath)} -Stage D -WithGrafana ${toPowerShellBool(args.withGrafana)}`;
  await runPowerShell(command);
}

async function runSmoke(args) {
  const scriptPath = path.join(SCRIPT_ROOT, "platform-smoke.ps1");
  const command =
    `& ${quotePowerShell(scriptPath)}` +
    ` -TimeoutSec ${args.timeoutSec}` +
    ` -MinPublished ${args.minPublished}`;
  await runPowerShell(command);
}

async function main() {
  const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));

  if (args.command === "start") {
    await runStart(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "health") {
    await runHealth(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "smoke") {
    await runSmoke(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "test") {
    await runStart(args);
    await runHealth(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "e2e") {
    await runStart(args);
    await runSmoke(args);
    return;
  }

  throw new Error(`Unsupported command: ${args.command}`);
}

main().catch((error) => {
  process.stderr.write(`${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}\n`);
  process.exit(1);
});

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import urllib.request
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

from airflow import DAG
from airflow.operators.python import PythonOperator


QUERY_API_BASE_URL = os.environ.get("PAPAWEB_QUERY_API_INTERNAL_URL", "http://query-api:18787").rstrip("/")


def _http_get(path: str) -> dict:
  req = urllib.request.Request(f"{QUERY_API_BASE_URL}{path}", method="GET")
  with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
    body = resp.read().decode("utf-8")
    if resp.status < 200 or resp.status >= 300:
      raise RuntimeError(f"GET {path} failed status={resp.status} body={body}")
    return json.loads(body) if body else {}


def _http_post(path: str, payload: dict) -> dict:
  data = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
  req = urllib.request.Request(
    f"{QUERY_API_BASE_URL}{path}",
    data=data,
    method="POST",
    headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
  )
  with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
    body = resp.read().decode("utf-8")
    if resp.status < 200 or resp.status >= 300:
      raise RuntimeError(f"POST {path} failed status={resp.status} body={body}")
    return json.loads(body) if body else {}


def trigger_seed_run() -> dict:
  payload = {
    "requestedBy": "airflow",
    "reason": "scheduled_seed_pipeline",
  }
  result = _http_post("/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run", payload)
  print(f"trigger result: {result}")
  return result


def snapshot_metrics() -> dict:
  metrics = _http_get("/api/v1/metrics")
  print(f"metrics snapshot: {metrics}")
  return metrics


with DAG(
  dag_id="papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline",
  description="Trigger seed job for platform workers and snapshot pipeline metrics",
  schedule="*/30 * * * *",
  start_date=datetime(2026, 3, 13),
  catchup=False,
  default_args={
    "owner": "papaweb",
    "retries": 1,
    "retry_delay": timedelta(minutes=2),
  },
  tags=["papaweb", "platform", "seed"],
) as dag:
  trigger_seed = PythonOperator(
    task_id="trigger_seed_run",
    python_callable=trigger_seed_run,
  )

  read_metrics = PythonOperator(
    task_id="snapshot_metrics",
    python_callable=snapshot_metrics,
  )

  trigger_seed >> read_metrics

Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, validatePublishQueueMessage } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  finalizeJobIfTerminal,
  getPlatformConfig,
  getTransactionHandle,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  popQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  settleTaskAsSuperseded,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const serviceName = "publish_worker";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

export async function processMessage(pg, message, options = {}) {
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const payload = validatePublishQueueMessage(message);
  const { traceId, jobId, taskId, sourceId, url } = payload;
  const runId = payload.runId ?? "";

  const settleAsSuperseded = async (errorMessage) => {
    const settlement = await settleTaskAsSuperseded(pg, {
      jobId,
      taskId,
      stage: TASK_STAGES.publish,
      currentStatus: TASK_STATUS.queuedPublish,
      error: errorMessage,
    });

    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale publish task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });

    if (settlement.updated) {
      await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
        runId,
        traceId,
        jobId,
        taskId,
        worker: workerServiceName,
        name: "task_superseded",
        payload: {
          sourceId,
          stage: TASK_STAGES.publish,
          reason: "superseded_by_active_run",
        },
      });
    }
  };

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    await settleAsSuperseded("superseded by active run before publish");
    return;
  }
  const db = await getTransactionHandle(pg);

  let publishEventPayload = null;
  try {
    await db.query("BEGIN");

    const taskRes = await db.query(
      "SELECT normalized, quality FROM crawl_tasks WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE",
      [taskId]
    );
    if (taskRes.rowCount === 0) {
      await db.query("ROLLBACK");
      return;
    }

    if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
      await db.query("ROLLBACK");
      await settleAsSuperseded("superseded by active run during publish");
      return;
    }

    const task = taskRes.rows[0];
    const normalized = task.normalized ?? {};
    const quality = task.quality ?? {};

    if (!quality.pass) {
      await db.query(
        `UPDATE crawl_tasks
         SET stage = $2, status = $3, updated_at = NOW()
         WHERE id = $1`,
        [taskId, TASK_STAGES.publish, TASK_STATUS.qualityRejected]
      );
      await finalizeJobIfTerminal(db, jobId);
      await db.query("COMMIT");
      return;
    }

    const title = String(normalized.title ?? "").trim() || url;
    const summary = String(normalized.summary ?? "").trim();
    const canonicalUrl = String(normalized.canonicalUrl ?? url).trim();
    const qualityScore = Number(quality.score ?? 0);

    await db.query(
      `INSERT INTO gold_tool_entities(
          run_id, canonical_url, title, summary, source_id, quality_score, trace_id, published_at, updated_at
       ) VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, NOW(), NOW())
       ON CONFLICT(canonical_url)
       DO UPDATE SET
         run_id = EXCLUDED.run_id,
         title = EXCLUDED.title,
         summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
         source_id = EXCLUDED.source_id,
         quality_score = EXCLUDED.quality_score,
         trace_id = EXCLUDED.trace_id,
         updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE EXCLUDED.quality_score > gold_tool_entities.quality_score
          OR (
            EXCLUDED.quality_score = gold_tool_entities.quality_score
            AND EXCLUDED.trace_id > gold_tool_entities.trace_id
          )`,
      [runId || null, canonicalUrl, title, summary, sourceId, qualityScore, traceId]
    );

    await db.query(
      `UPDATE crawl_tasks
       SET stage = $2, status = $3, published = TRUE, updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE id = $1`,
      [taskId, TASK_STAGES.publish, TASK_STATUS.published]
    );

    await finalizeJobIfTerminal(db, jobId);
    await db.query("COMMIT");

    publishEventPayload = {
      canonicalUrl,
      title,
      qualityScore,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    try {
      await db.query("ROLLBACK");
    } catch {
      // Preserve the original failure from the publish flow.
    }
    throw error;
  } finally {
    db.release?.();
  }

  if (!publishEventPayload) {
    return;
  }

  await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
    runId,
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    worker: workerServiceName,
    name: "published",
    payload: publishEventPayload,
  });
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    while (!stopping) {
      const message = await popQueue(redis, config.queues.publish, config.pollSeconds);
      if (!message) {
        await sleep(150);
        continue;
      }
      try {
        await processMessage(pg, message);
      } catch (error) {
        log(serviceName, "error", "process publish message failed", {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          message,
        });
      }
    }
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "publish_worker crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, requireString } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  buildSourceFetchOptions,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  fetchTextResource,
  finalizeJobIfTerminal,
  getTransactionHandle,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  popQueue,
  pushQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  settleTaskAsSuperseded,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";
import { acquireNextFetchTask } from "./fetch-claim.mjs";
import { recoverStaleFetchTasks } from "./fetch-recovery.mjs";
import { createSourceSiteStore } from "./source-site-store.mjs";

const serviceName = "worker-fetch-http";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
const sourceSiteStore = createSourceSiteStore({
  cacheTtlMs: process.env.PAPAWEB_SOURCE_SITE_CACHE_TTL_MS ?? 0,
});
const sourceNextAllowedAt = new Map();
const sourceInFlight = new Set();
let claimGate = Promise.resolve();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

function toPositiveInt(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : fallback;
}

function randomBetween(min, max) {
  if (max <= min) return min;
  return min + Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1));
}

function resolveDelayRange(sourceSite) {
  const meta = sourceSite?.meta && typeof sourceSite.meta === "object" ? sourceSite.meta : {};
  const baseDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_ms, 1500);
  const minDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_min_ms, baseDelay);
  const maxDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_max_ms, Math.max(baseDelay, minDelay));
  return {
    min: Math.max(0, minDelay),
    max: Math.max(minDelay, maxDelay),
  };
}

async function loadSourceSite(pg, sourceId) {
  return sourceSiteStore.load(pg, sourceId);
}

function normalizeHttpStatus(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : null;
}

async function fetchHtml(url, sourceSite, workerConfig = config) {
  const options = buildSourceFetchOptions(sourceSite, workerConfig);
  const response = await fetchTextResource(url, options);
  return {
    ok: response.ok,
    status: response.status,
    html: response.text.slice(0, 250000),
    finalUrl: response.finalUrl || url,
    fetchChannel: response.fetchChannel || "http",
    decodedCharset: response.decodedCharset || "",
    error: response.error,
    failureCategory: response.failureCategory ?? null,
    attemptCount: Number(response.attemptCount ?? 1),
    fallbackAttempted: Boolean(response.fallbackAttempted),
    fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(response.fallbackSucceeded),
    fallbackTriggerCategory: response.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
    fallbackTriggerStatus: normalizeHttpStatus(response.fallbackTriggerStatus),
    fallbackError: response.fallbackError ?? null,
  };
}

export async function processClaimedTask(pg, redis, claimed, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const loadSourceSiteImpl = options.loadSourceSiteImpl ?? loadSourceSite;
  const fetchHtmlImpl =
    options.fetchHtmlImpl ?? ((url, sourceSite) => fetchHtml(url, sourceSite, workerConfig));
  const pushQueueImpl = options.pushQueueImpl ?? pushQueue;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  const taskId = requireString(claimed.id, "id");
  const runId = String(claimed.run_id || "").trim();
  const traceId = requireString(claimed.trace_id, "trace_id");
  const jobId = requireString(claimed.job_id, "job_id");
  const sourceId = requireString(claimed.source_id, "source_id");
  const url = requireString(claimed.url, "url");

  const settleAsSuperseded = async (errorMessage) => {
    const settlement = await settleTaskAsSuperseded(pg, {
      taskId,
      jobId,
      stage: TASK_STAGES.fetch,
      currentStatus: TASK_STATUS.fetching,
      error: errorMessage,
      clearFetchClaim: true,
    });

    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale fetch task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });

    if (settlement.updated) {
      await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
        runId,
        traceId,
        jobId,
        taskId,
        worker: workerServiceName,
        name: "task_superseded",
        payload: {
          sourceId,
          stage: TASK_STAGES.fetch,
          reason: "superseded_by_active_run",
        },
      });
    }
  };

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    await settleAsSuperseded("superseded by active run before fetch");
    return;
  }

  try {
    const sourceSite = await loadSourceSiteImpl(pg, sourceId);
    const nextAllowedAt = sourceNextAllowedAt.get(sourceId) ?? 0;
    const waitMs = Math.max(0, nextAllowedAt - Date.now());
    if (waitMs > 0) {
      await sleepImpl(waitMs);
    }

    let fetched;
    try {
      fetched = await fetchHtmlImpl(url, sourceSite);
    } finally {
      const delayRange = resolveDelayRange(sourceSite);
      sourceNextAllowedAt.set(
        sourceId,
        Date.now() + randomBetween(delayRange.min, delayRange.max)
      );
    }

    if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
      await settleAsSuperseded("superseded by active run during fetch");
      return;
    }

    if (!fetched.ok) {
      const failureStatus = normalizeHttpStatus(fetched.status);
      const db = await getTransactionHandle(pg);
      try {
        await db.query("BEGIN");
        const taskUpdate = await db.query(
          `UPDATE crawl_tasks
           SET stage = $2,
               status = $3,
               error = $4,
               http_status = $5,
               final_url = $6,
               fetch_channel = $7,
               decoded_charset = $8,
               fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
               fetch_worker = NULL,
               updated_at = NOW()
           WHERE id = $1`,
          [
            taskId,
            TASK_STAGES.fetch,
            TASK_STATUS.fetchFailed,
            fetched.error,
            failureStatus,
            fetched.finalUrl,
            fetched.fetchChannel,
            fetched.decodedCharset,
          ]
        );
        if (taskUpdate.rowCount === 0) {
          await db.query("ROLLBACK");
          return;
        }
        await db.query(
          `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
           VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), NOW())
           ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
           DO UPDATE SET
             status = EXCLUDED.status,
             last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
             last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
             last_fetched_at = NOW(),
             updated_at = NOW()`,
          [sourceId, url, "fetch_failed", failureStatus, fetched.error]
        );
        await finalizeJobIfTerminal(db, jobId);
        await db.query("COMMIT");
      } catch (error) {
        try {
          await db.query("ROLLBACK");
        } catch {
          // Preserve the original fetch failure persistence error.
        }
        throw error;
      } finally {
        db.release?.();
      }
      await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
        runId,
        traceId,
        jobId,
        taskId,
        worker: workerServiceName,
        name: "fetch_failed",
        payload: {
          url,
          finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
          httpStatus: failureStatus,
          fetchChannel: fetched.fetchChannel,
          error: fetched.error,
          failureCategory: fetched.failureCategory ?? null,
          attemptCount: fetched.attemptCount ?? null,
          fallbackAttempted: Boolean(fetched.fallbackAttempted),
          fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(fetched.fallbackSucceeded),
          fallbackTriggerCategory: fetched.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
          fallbackTriggerStatus: fetched.fallbackTriggerStatus ?? null,
          fallbackError: fetched.fallbackError ?? null,
        },
      });
      return;
    }

    const successStatus = normalizeHttpStatus(fetched.status);
    const updateResult = await pg.query(
      `UPDATE crawl_tasks
       SET stage = $2,
           status = $3,
           http_status = $4,
           raw_html = $5,
           final_url = $6,
           fetch_channel = $7,
           decoded_charset = $8,
           error = NULL,
           fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
           fetch_worker = NULL,
           updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE id = $1`,
      [
        taskId,
        TASK_STAGES.fetch,
        TASK_STATUS.queuedNormalize,
        successStatus,
        fetched.html,
        fetched.finalUrl,
        fetched.fetchChannel,
        fetched.decodedCharset,
      ]
    );
    if (updateResult.rowCount === 0) {
      return;
    }
    await pg.query(
      `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
       VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
       ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
       DO UPDATE SET
         status = EXCLUDED.status,
         last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
         last_error = NULL,
         last_fetched_at = NOW(),
         updated_at = NOW()`,
      [sourceId, url, "fetched", successStatus]
    );

    const next = {
      ...(runId ? { runId } : {}),
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      url,
      finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
      httpStatus: successStatus,
    };
    await pushQueueImpl(redis, workerConfig.queues.normalize, next);
    await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
      runId,
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      worker: workerServiceName,
      name: "fetch_ok",
      payload: {
        url,
        finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
        httpStatus: successStatus,
        fetchChannel: fetched.fetchChannel,
        queue: workerConfig.queues.normalize,
        attemptCount: fetched.attemptCount ?? null,
        fallbackAttempted: Boolean(fetched.fallbackAttempted),
        fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(fetched.fallbackSucceeded),
        fallbackTriggerCategory: fetched.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
        fallbackTriggerStatus: fetched.fallbackTriggerStatus ?? null,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);

    if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
      await settleAsSuperseded("superseded by active run during fetch");
      return;
    }

    const db = await getTransactionHandle(pg);
    try {
      await db.query("BEGIN");
      const taskUpdate = await db.query(
        `UPDATE crawl_tasks
         SET stage = $2,
             status = $3,
             error = $4,
             fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
             fetch_worker = NULL,
             updated_at = NOW()
         WHERE id = $1`,
        [taskId, TASK_STAGES.fetch, TASK_STATUS.fetchFailed, errorMessage]
      );
      if (taskUpdate.rowCount === 0) {
        await db.query("ROLLBACK");
        return;
      }
      await db.query(
        `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
         VALUES($1, $2, $3, NULL, $4, NOW(), NOW())
         ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
         DO UPDATE SET
           status = EXCLUDED.status,
           last_http_status = NULL,
           last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
           last_fetched_at = NOW(),
           updated_at = NOW()`,
        [sourceId, url, "fetch_failed", errorMessage]
      );
      await finalizeJobIfTerminal(db, jobId);
      await db.query("COMMIT");
    } catch (persistenceError) {
      try {
        await db.query("ROLLBACK");
      } catch {
        // Preserve the original worker error persistence failure.
      }
      throw persistenceError;
    } finally {
      db.release?.();
    }
    await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
      runId,
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      worker: workerServiceName,
      name: "fetch_failed",
      payload: {
        url,
        finalUrl: url,
        httpStatus: null,
        fetchChannel: null,
        error: errorMessage,
        failureCategory: "worker_error",
        attemptCount: null,
        fallbackAttempted: false,
        fallbackSucceeded: false,
        fallbackTriggerCategory: null,
        fallbackTriggerStatus: null,
        fallbackError: null,
      },
    });
  }
}

async function runLoop(pg, redis) {
  let nextDatabaseSweepAt = 0;

  while (!stopping) {
    const now = Date.now();
    const preferDatabase = now >= nextDatabaseSweepAt;
    if (preferDatabase) {
      nextDatabaseSweepAt = now + Math.max(1000, Number(config.fetchDbSweepIntervalMs ?? 5000));
    }

    const acquired = await withClaimGate(async () =>
      acquireNextFetchTask(pg, redis, {
        queueName: config.queues.fetch,
        pollSeconds: config.pollSeconds,
        leaseMs: config.fetchStaleAfterMs,
        preferDatabase,
        workerName: serviceName,
        serviceName,
        sourceInFlight,
        popQueueImpl: popQueue,
        pushQueueImpl: pushQueue,
        sleepImpl: sleep,
      })
    );
    if (!acquired) {
      await sleep(150);
      continue;
    }

    const sourceId = String(acquired.claimed?.source_id || "").trim();
    try {
      await processClaimedTask(pg, redis, acquired.claimed);
    } catch (error) {
      log(serviceName, "error", "process fetch message failed", {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        taskId: acquired.claimed?.id ?? null,
        sourceId: acquired.claimed?.source_id ?? null,
        origin: acquired.origin,
      });
    } finally {
      if (sourceId) {
        sourceInFlight.delete(sourceId);
      }
    }
  }
}

async function withClaimGate(fn) {
  const previous = claimGate;
  let release;
  claimGate = new Promise((resolve) => {
    release = resolve;
  });

  await previous;
  try {
    return await fn();
  } finally {
    release();
  }
}

async function runRecoveryLoop(pg, redis) {
  const intervalMs = Math.max(1000, Number(config.fetchRecoveryIntervalMs ?? 30000));
  while (!stopping) {
    try {
      const result = await recoverStaleFetchTasks(pg, redis, {
        staleAfterMs: config.fetchStaleAfterMs,
        batchSize: config.fetchRecoveryBatchSize,
        queueName: config.queues.fetch,
        workerName: serviceName,
        pushQueueImpl: pushQueue,
        recordPipelineEventImpl: recordPipelineEvent,
      });
      if (result.recoveredCount > 0) {
        log(serviceName, "warn", "recovered stale fetching tasks", {
          recoveredCount: result.recoveredCount,
          taskIds: result.tasks.map((task) => task.id),
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      log(serviceName, "error", "recover stale fetching tasks failed", {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      });
    }
    await sleep(intervalMs);
  }
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    const loops = Array.from(
      { length: Math.max(1, config.fetchConcurrency) },
      () => runLoop(pg, redis)
    );
    loops.push(runRecoveryLoop(pg, redis));
    await Promise.all(loops);
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-fetch-http crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}
Tool Result #190 shell_command call_bAcbsO6bPVS9CEc6GWA1JbmC exit 0 00:48:54
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: import process from "node:process"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; import { createPgPool, createRedisClient, enqueueDiscov...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import {
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  enqueueDiscoveryBatch,
  enqueueSeedBatch,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  loadSeedPlan,
  log,
  parseBool,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const config = getPlatformConfig();
const serviceName = "worker-seed";
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

export async function enqueueOnce(pg, redis, requestedBy, reason, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const loadSeedPlanImpl = options.loadSeedPlanImpl ?? loadSeedPlan;
  const enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl = options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl ?? enqueueDiscoveryBatch;
  const enqueueSeedBatchImpl = options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl ?? enqueueSeedBatch;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;

  const seedPlan = await loadSeedPlanImpl({
    seedUrls: workerConfig.seedUrls,
    sourceId: workerConfig.sourceId,
    sourceIds: workerConfig.sourceIds,
    sourceSitesConfigPath: workerConfig.sourceSitesConfigPath,
  });

  const result =
    seedPlan.sourceSites && seedPlan.sourceSites.length > 0
      ? await enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
          queues: workerConfig.queues,
          workerName: workerServiceName,
          requestedBy,
          reason,
        })
      : await enqueueSeedBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
          queues: workerConfig.queues,
          workerName: workerServiceName,
          requestedBy,
          reason,
        });

  logImpl(workerServiceName, "info", "seed batch enqueued", result);
  return result;
}

async function main() {
  const onceMode = process.argv.includes("--once") || parseBool(process.env.PAPAWEB_SEED_ONCE, false);
  const passiveMode = config.seedPassive;
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);

  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    if (onceMode) {
      await enqueueOnce(pg, redis, "worker-seed", "once");
      return;
    }

    if (passiveMode) {
      log(serviceName, "info", "seed worker in passive mode; waiting Airflow/API trigger", {
        sourceIds: config.sourceIds,
      });
      while (!stopping) {
        await sleep(2000);
      }
      return;
    }

    while (!stopping) {
      try {
        await enqueueOnce(pg, redis, "worker-seed", "loop");
      } catch (error) {
        log(serviceName, "error", "seed loop failed", {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        });
      }
      if (stopping) break;
      await sleep(config.seedIntervalSeconds * 1000);
    }
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-seed crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

我已按代码、文档、提交历史、测试结果做了完整盘点（含你们自研主代码；`upstream-*` 这类上游镜像目录单独识别，不计入“你们已实现功能”）。 **当前阶段结论** - 你们现在处在：**Plan0 主链路闭环已完成并可回归**，但**平台控制面（P0）还没真正开工**。 - 一句话：**执行链路成熟了，平台化入口还没落地**。 **最核心目标任务（先理清）** - 目标不是再堆采集脚本，而是把已有链路平台化，让用户能“下任...

Expand full message

我已按代码、文档、提交历史、测试结果做了完整盘点（含你们自研主代码；upstream-* 这类上游镜像目录单独识别，不计入“你们已实现功能”）。

当前阶段结论
- 你们现在处在：Plan0 主链路闭环已完成并可回归，但平台控制面（P0）还没真正开工。
- 一句话：执行链路成熟了，平台化入口还没落地。

最核心目标任务（先理清）
- 目标不是再堆采集脚本，而是把已有链路平台化，让用户能“下任务、看运行、查明细、重试/取消、做配置、可审计”。
- 依据文档：从“最小采集闭环”升级为“可操作后台平台”（见 [00-总览](/d:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/平台升级方案/00-总览.md)、[04-实施阶段与验收标准](/d:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/平台升级方案/04-实施阶段与验收标准.md)）。

已经完成了什么
- 治理与流程：dev 分支协作、PR 模板、pre-push 拦截、CI/E2E 流水线都已落地（[执行待办清单](/d:/demo1/papaweb/docs/执行待办清单.md)、[ci.yml](/d:/demo1/papaweb/.github/workflows/ci.yml)、[e2e.yml](/d:/demo1/papaweb/.github/workflows/e2e.yml)）。
- Plan0 主链路：seed -> discovery -> fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish -> query 已实现，且各环节有单测/集成测试覆盖。
- Query API v1：列表、导出、metrics、手动 seed-run 已可用（[query-api index](/d:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs)）。
- Stage D 运维闭环：分层 Compose、healthcheck、smoke、runbook 已具备（[runbook](/d:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan0-stage-d-runbook.md)）。
- 2026-03-23 本地验证结果：npm run test:unit 全绿；npm run test:e2e 全绿（含 smoke 通过）。

还没完成 / 还没开始的关键项
- 平台前端仍是占位：[apps/web](/d:/demo1/papaweb/apps/web/README.md)。
- 平台 API v2 未落地：当前只有 /api/v1/*，没有 /api/v2/runs|jobs|tasks...。
- pipeline_runs 一级对象未建：schema 里暂无该表（[schema](/d:/demo1/papaweb/packages/shared/src/schema.mjs)）。
- 权限、审计、模板、计划任务、清洗规则配置、导出任务中心等平台层能力仍缺失。
- 结论上等于：你们“首批 PR（主链路稳定化）基本完成”，但“平台升级 P0/P1/P2/P3 还在规划态”。

接下来应该做什么（优先级）
1. 先做 P0：新增 pipeline_runs + /api/v2/runs|jobs|tasks|events|artifacts（读接口先行）。
2. 做运行控制：run cancel/retry、task retry/cancel，并补充状态机测试。
3. 启动前端骨架：先落“新建任务页 + 运行中心页 + 运行详情页”最小三页。
4. 保留 /api/v1/* 兼容，新增 E2E 覆盖 v2 主流程。
5. P1 再上配置中心：source-sites CRUD、strategy-profiles、task-templates、quality-policies。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接给你一版“按你们分支规范可执行的 PR 拆分清单（PR 标题、范围、验收、测试命令）”，你们可以按单开工。
